title: Building archaeology informative modelling turned into 3D volume stratigraphy and extended reality time-lapse communication

paper_analysis.summary: The paper presents a case study using laser scanning, photogrammetry, and HBIM to build a 3D stratigraphic model for documenting and preserving a damaged historic church after an earthquake.
paper_analysis.processed_plot_details: The paper appears to describe a case study using laser scanning, photogrammetry, and HBIM to create a 3D stratigraphic model, but no accessible dataset or source files were provided in the available information.
